description: Omni-market platform registry — RootMem-style execution rules and constraints. Simulation only until Phase C charter.

platforms.name: Kalshi
rules: Contracts settle to $0 or $1 based on event outcome
Position size capped at available balance in simulation
No shorting beyond owned contracts in paper mode

rootMemoryUnits.rules: Binary settlement; hold through resolution or exit before close
rootMemoryUnits.evidence: CFTC-regulated event contracts; price = implied probability

platforms.name: Polymarket
rules: US persons restricted — simulation uses global fixture set only
Liquidity pool AMM slippage modeled at 50 bps in paper mode

rootMemoryUnits.rules: Large orders walk the book; size positions under 5% of pool depth
rootMemoryUnits.evidence: AMM curve implies nonlinear fill price

platforms.name: PrizePicks
rules: 6-pick flex: max payout multiplier 25x in standard flex rules
Correlated picks same game reduce effective edge — penalize in sim
All picks must be over/under on published lines only

rootMemoryUnits.rules: 6-pick flex requires all legs to hit for max payout tier
rootMemoryUnits.evidence: One miss typically voids flex multiplier — use power play rules in sim

platforms.name: Robinhood
rules: Pattern day trader rule: max 3 day-trades per 5 days under $25k equity in sim
Fractional shares allowed; no margin in paper mode
Market orders filled at next fixture bar open

rootMemoryUnits.rules: Flag day-trade count; block 4th round-trip within 5 sessions
rootMemoryUnits.evidence: FINRA PDT rule for accounts under $25k
